name: get_user_followers
description: List the followers of a specific Twitter user, identified by their numeric user ID. Returns paginated user objects with profile information. Useful for analyzing audience composition or finding influential followers.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The numeric user ID whose followers you want to list. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of followers to return per request. Value between 1 and 1000. Default is 100.

parameters.name: user.fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of user fields to return. Options include: created_at, description, location, profile_image_url, public_metrics, url, verified, verified_type.

parameters.name: pagination_token
parameters.description: Pagination token from a previous response to retrieve the next page of results.

data.name: Alice Engineer
data.description: Software engineer at BigCorp. Open source enthusiast.
